1127.issue: [W1127] [io-package.json](https://github.com/klein0r/ioBroker.lametric/blob/master/io-package.json): instanceObject "meta.mode" common.states must be number or string

1133.issue: [W1133] [io-package.json](https://github.com/klein0r/ioBroker.lametric/blob/master/io-package.json): instanceObject "meta.wifi.ip" role "info.ip" expects common.type to be one of [boolean], but found "string"

2008.issue: [S2008] Version 6.0.0 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

3032.issue: [S3032] No workflow run for "test-and-release.yml" triggered by tag "v6.0.0" was found for current release 6.0.0. Workflow logs might be deleted already.

5050.issue: [E5050] process.exit() used in  (main.js). This is incompatible with compact mode as it terminates the entire host process. Remove process.exit() or set common.compact to false at [io-package.json](https://github.com/klein0r/ioBroker.lametric/blob/master/io-package.json).

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

5612.issue: [W5612] "admin/jsonConfig.json/items/_advanced/items/mydatadiy/items[0]" attribute "validatorErrorText" uses key "Invalid format" which is not found in the English translation file at "admin/i18n/en".

6022.issue: [S6022] CHANGELOG_OLD.md exists but no link to it was found in [README.md](https://github.com/klein0r/ioBroker.lametric/blob/master/README.md). Consider adding a link to CHANGELOG_OLD.md at the end of the Changelog section.

6024.issue: [W6024] [README.md](https://github.com/klein0r/ioBroker.lametric/blob/master/README.md) contains the Sentry information, but it is located too far down in the document. Please move it near the top of README.

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#361] "[iobroker-bot] Align @tsconfig/nodeXX with engines.node in [package.json](https://github.com/klein0r/ioBroker.lametric/blob/master/package.json)"](https://github.com/klein0r/ioBroker.lametric/issues/361)

0036.issue: [E0036] @alcalzone/release-script 5.2.0 specified. 5.2.1 is required as minimum,  5.2.1 (or newer) is current. Please update devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/klein0r/ioBroker.lametric/blob/master/package.json)

0085.issue: [S0085] No devDependency "@tsconfig/nodeXX" found. Consider adding one for proper type checking (see ioBroker.examples for examples).

0088.issue: [S0088] "/tsconfig.json" should contain an extends clause like "extends": "@tsconfig/node20/tsconfig.json" (see ioBroker.examples).

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.9.3" at [package.json](https://github.com/klein0r/ioBroker.lametric/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
